title: Beef Roti
description: A Malaysian-inspired dish featuring richly flavored beef in a flaky pastry wrap.
instructions: In a large pan over medium-high heat, heat the oil and cook the beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the shallots, garlic, and ginger to the pan and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the curry powder, salt, and pepper to the pan and cook for an additional minute.
Roll out the pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Spoon the beef mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges of the pastry with a little water and fold the other half of the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Use a knife to cut a few slits in the top of the pastry to allow steam to escape.
Brush the top of the pastry with a little oil and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
